scripts.docker:dev: node scripts/check-ports.mjs && node scripts/gen-version.mjs backend && node scripts/gen-version.mjs front && node scripts/gen-version.mjs docs && docker-compose up --build
scripts.docker:prod: DB_FILE=strata.db NODE_ENV=production ENABLE_SWAGGER=false RESTART_POLICY=always sh -c 'node scripts/gen-version.mjs backend && node scripts/gen-version.mjs front && node scripts/gen-version.mjs docs && docker-compose up --build -d'
scripts.docker:reset: node scripts/check-ports.mjs && docker-compose down && rm -f backend/.data/strata-dev.db && node scripts/gen-version.mjs backend && node scripts/gen-version.mjs front && node scripts/gen-version.mjs docs && docker-compose build --no-cache && docker-compose up
